subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Give thanks unto God, for He hath adorned thy head with the crown of praise in the days of thy Lord, the Possessor of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی اشکر الله بما زین راسک باکلیل الثناء فی ایام ربک مالک الاسماء و هیکلک
subcodes.subjects: @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @empty learning; false spirituality, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity of thought and belief
